title: Pentagon Declassifies More UFO Sightings Though No Sight Of Little Green Space Dudes
description: Lifelong sky watchers seem a little let down after getting everything they asked for in newly uncovered, underwhelming evidence

title: What the FBI’s Secret UFO Files Actually Say — and What They Don’t
description: Hoover's memos, three-foot crewmen and New Mexico wreckage: America's oldest obsession gets a new archive to obsess over

title: Pentagon's UFO website bombarded with 340 million hits in first 12 hours
UFO files include report from West Rindge, NH
description: UFO files released by Pentagon include details of suspicious metal fragments found in West Rindge, NH in 1947

title: Pentagon’s UFO website bombarded with 340 million hits in first 12 hours
description: The newly unveiled website that's now home to scores of previously classified UFO files was bombarded with well over 340 million hits in its first few hours, Pentagon officials said.
